evals.name: schema-parsing

assertions.trap: z.any() used for name instead of z.unknown() or proper type
parse() with try/catch instead of safeParse() for user input
manual User interface instead of z.infer<typeof UserSchema>
age is z.string() then parseInt, should use z.coerce.number()
role validated with includes() instead of z.enum(['admin', 'user', 'guest'])
email has no .email() validation
.optional().optional().optional() chained redundantly

evals.name: error-handling

assertions.trap: only first error shown, not all validation issues
manual error extraction instead of .flatten() or .format()
nested errors (items[0].quantity) lose path info with current approach
no custom error messages on schema fields
throwing inside refine() instead of returning false

evals.name: object-composition

assertions.trap: CreateUserSchema duplicates fields instead of UserSchema.omit({ id, createdAt })
UpdateUserSchema duplicates with .optional() instead of CreateUserSchema.partial()
ShapeSchema uses optional fields instead of z.discriminatedUnion on type
ConfigSchema silently strips unknown keys (debug, secret) — should use .strict()
id is just z.string().uuid() — could use .brand() for UserId type safety

evals.name: advanced

assertions.trap: raw JSON cast as ApiResponse instead of parsing with schema
schema created inside component render on every cycle
z.infer on transform gives output type (Date), should use z.input for input type (string)
self-referencing schema causes ReferenceError, should use z.lazy()
